_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: Of EGFP-expressing SCs, 21% were P-Stat3 fl/fl;DhhCre;EGFP+ only, 62% expressed only β-catenin+ and, importantly, 6.7% of EGFP+ SCs were P-Stat3+ and β-catenin+
details: Successfully detected β-catenin in 62% of EGFP-expressing SCs, with 6.7% showing co-expression with P-Stat3
